The '''Arkanian Dominion''' was the [[Planet/Legends|planetary]] government of [[Near-Human|near-human]] [[Arkanian/Legends|Arkanian]] species on [[Arkania/Legends|Arkania]] throughout its history. Aligned with the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], the Dominion was represented in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] and later the [[Imperial Senate/Legends|Imperial Senate]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].

==History==
The Arkanian Dominion was the corporate meritocracy established on the planet [[Arkania/Legends|Arkania]] during the world's early history. Made up of members of the [[Arkanian/Legends|Arkanian]] race, the Dominion was heavily influenced by corporate entities such as [[the Adasca BioMechanical Corporation of Arkania]] run by the [[House of Adasca]], an affluent family after whom the capital city [[Adascopolis]] was named.<ref name="KOTOR16" />

Throughout Arkanian history, the Dominion actively allowed rampant genetic alterations to be conducted on various [[Species/Legends|species]] like the [[Quermian/Legends|Quermians]] and the [[Yaka]]. In [[50 BBY/Legends|50 BBY]],<ref name="NEC">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]''</ref> the [[Arkanian Renegades]],<ref name="SotJ">[[Secrets of the Jedi (novel)|''Secrets of the Jedi'']]</ref> a group that opposed this genetic experimentation on the Yaka, tried to overthrow the Dominion in the [[Arkanian Revolution]]. These rebels overtook the [[Geneticist/Legends|geneticists]] with [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] [[Cyborg/Legends|cyborgs]], so the Dominion appealed to the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] for aid. With the Order's intervention, the revolution was put down and the Dominion remained in power.<ref name="NEC" />
